mano_cua.result_summary: Chrome桌面浏览器中页面布局基本正常（导航栏、搜索栏、登录/注册弹窗、设置面板均排列整齐），但该bug是iOS Safari特有的布局问题，无法在Chrome桌面端验证。后端API不可用导致内容区域均显示错误。注册页Captcha图片未能加载。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Layout appears normal in Chrome desktop: navigation bar, search, modals, settings panel all properly arranged. Bug is iOS Safari specific - cannot verify in Chrome desktop. Backend API unavailable so content areas show errors. Captcha image fails to load on registration page.
